meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Debug Faster
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills setup to crush complex bugs. An advanced guide for students using Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate software development.
content.answer_block: To overcome debugging gridlock, integrate Claude Code into your local environment to perform autonomous root-cause analysis. By pairing Claude’s agentic reasoning with Antigravity’s structural oversight, you transform opaque stack traces into actionable refactorings. This setup allows you to iterate faster, learn complex patterns, and ship production-ready code as a student.
content.intro:
The screen flickers, the console is bleeding red, and your deadline is looming. You’ve been staring at the same stack trace for three hours, feeling the weight of 'imposter syndrome' settle in. Every developer has been there; the difference between a struggling student and a senior engineer is the ability to leverage intelligent tooling to pierce through the noise of complex errors.

Today, we stop fighting the code and start mastering it. By configuring Claude Code as your primary debugging partner, you aren't just fixing bugs—you are building a recursive learning loop. This guide bridges the gap between frustration and mastery, showing you how to turn your terminal into an AI-powered engineering command center.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Establish a secure, context-aware foundation by configuring your project environment to recognize Claude Code's agentic patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project directory and create a context.md file that outlines the architecture, key dependencies, and current debugging hurdles.

steps.title: Agentic Debugging Setup
steps.description: Grant Claude Code access to your local filesystem to allow for deep-dive analysis of conflicting dependencies.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the agent to prioritize identifying race conditions and memory leaks within the current module.

steps.title: Execution of Deep-Trace Analysis
steps.description: Run an automated diagnostic sweep to map out the dependency graph and identify where the logic breaks down.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a recursive trace of the failing function and map the call stack to identify the exact point of failure.

steps.title: Iterative Refactoring
steps.description: Apply targeted fixes through the agent, ensuring that each change is verified by automated test suites.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a refactor plan for the identified bug that adheres to clean code principles and integrates with the existing test suite.

steps.title: Validation and Documentation
steps.description: Finalize the fix and generate clear documentation so you understand the 'why' behind the solution for future reference.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize the fix applied, explain why the bug occurred, and suggest proactive measures to prevent recurrence.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit --message 'fix: resolved critical race condition in auth module'

pro_tips: Always use --trace-depth to prevent the agent from getting lost in infinite recursion within complex node_modules.
Maintain a 'context.md' file in your root; Claude Code treats this as its primary source of truth, significantly reducing hallucination.
Use Antigravity to generate pseudo-code before asking Claude to implement it to ensure the logic aligns with your architectural vision.
Run your test suite concurrently with the Claude CLI to catch side-effect regressions before they reach your deployment branch.
Periodically clear the Claude session history to force the agent to re-evaluate the codebase with a clean, updated context.
content.next_steps: After mastering these debugging workflows, begin integrating automated CI/CD pipelines to ensure your AI-assisted code remains stable across every commit.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs stall your growth and start shipping with the confidence of a lead engineer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
